nasb.text: Then the tabernacle was taken down; and the sons of Gershon and the sons of Merari, who were carrying the tabernacle, set out.

esv.text: And when the tabernacle was taken down, the sons of Gershon and the sons of Merari, who carried the tabernacle, set out.

cnv.text: 帳幕拆下來以後，革順的子孫和米拉利的子孫，就抬著帳幕起行。

ccb.text: 然后，圣幕被拆下，革顺和米拉利的子孙抬着圣幕出发。
